description: Skill taxonomy for the Vietnamese general labour and blue-collar sector covering factory workers, drivers, warehousing, security/maintenance, cleaning, beauty, F&B, hospitality, retail promoters, handicraft, metalworking and construction trades. Includes Vietnam-specific regulatory requirements (Luật An toàn VSLĐ 2015, PCCC regulations, petroleum station safety, VAT invoice requirements, welding/elevator certifications) and Vietnam-specific tools (MISA, VN POS systems).
